summary: Arena ground tile renderer: opens .pcl tilemap + .GMD model data, frustum culling (distance 7500), tile-by-tile gSPDisplayList dispatch with palette. Draws the floor grid fighters stand on.

functions.ground_load: Load .pcl + .GMD, set up tile grid, palette, rotation matrix

functions.ground_frustum_compute: NON_EQUIVALENT: Compute 8 frustum corners, transform to world space, derive visible tile range

functions.ground_render: Compute frustum, dispatch G_DL for each visible tile in range

types: GroundTileHeader { tileCountX, tileCountZ, tileSizeX, tileSizeZ } — PCL header
subsystems: Tilemap: .pcl tile count/size, .GMD texture+palette, camera rotation
